headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Health Care Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks in turbulent markets. Benzinga readers can check analyst takes on stocks at Analyst Stock Ratings page.
